name: saucedemo-playwright-ui-tests
description: Projeto de testes automatizados UI com Playwright no SauceDemo

scripts.test:allure: npx playwright test && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.test:allure:clean: npm run allure:clean && npx playwright test && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open

author: Bruna Valnei
